title: Horoscope
content:
Ere he was born, the stars of fate
    Plotted to make him rich and great:
    When from the womb the babe was loosed,
    The gate of gifts behind him closed.
meaning:
"Horoscope" is a quintessential example of Ralph Waldo Emerson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
